headline: Assessing Lockheed Martin (LMT) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price And Total Return Performance

headline: Geopolitical Tensions Put Lockheed Martin Defense And Digital Upgrades In Focus
summary: U.S. and Israeli forces recently carried out coordinated military actions against Iran, putting renewed focus on defense readiness and air power. F-35 fighter jets, produced by Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT), featured prominently in these operations, highlighting their role in current combat planning. Lockheed Martin has also been working on AI-powered combat identification tools and real-time software upgrades for its platforms. For you as an investor, this puts Lockheed Martin's core defense...

headline: There Are Worries the U.S. Could Run Out of Missiles in Iran. These Contractors Are Who It’s Turning To.

headline: Defense companies poised to ramp up production amid Iran war
summary: Israel's airstrikes against Iran and Lebanon have Wall Street investors anxious over the risk these escalations could have on global markets if they continue for too long, as not only US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are seeing losses in Tuesday's session, but the defense industry as well. Gabelli Funds portfolio manager Tony Bancroft comes on Market Catalysts to discuss the defense manufacturer's inventory-production dynamic as Middle East conflicts ramp up and how he is forecasting increased capex spending for these contractors. Bancroft manages the Gabelli Commercial Aerospace and Defense ETF (GCAD). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

content.title: Defense companies poised to ramp up production amid Iran war
content.description:
Israel's airstrikes against Iran and Lebanon have Wall Street investors anxious over the risk these escalations could have on global markets if they continue for too long, as not only US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are seeing losses in Tuesday's session, but the defense industry as well.

Gabelli Funds portfolio manager Tony Bancroft comes on Market Catalysts to discuss the defense manufacturer's inventory-production dynamic as Middle East conflicts ramp up and how he is forecasting increased capex spending for these contractors.

Bancroft manages the Gabelli Commercial Aerospace and Defense ETF (GCAD).

To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: Don't underestimate the role of Palantir, AI in Iran conflict
summary: Defense stocks — like Lockheed Martin (LMT), RTX (RTX), and Northrop Grumman (NOC) — are sliding in Tuesday's session amid escalations in the Middle East conflict after Israel bombed Iran and Lebanon. Baird Tech Strategist Ted Mortonson comes on Market Domination to discuss the role Palantir Technologies (PLTR) and other AI operators could have in Iran. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
